SelectiveContentGuarding.description: Selective content guarding controls for enforced guardrails

System.description: Selective guarding mode for system prompts
System.markdownDescription:
Selective guarding mode for system prompts

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: SELECTIVE | COMPREHENSIVE  
Update requires: No interruption

Messages.description: Selective guarding mode for user messages
Messages.markdownDescription:
Selective guarding mode for user messages

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: SELECTIVE | COMPREHENSIVE  
Update requires: No interruption

SelectiveContentGuarding.markdownDescription:
Selective content guarding controls for enforced guardrails

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

ConfigOwner.markdownDescription:
Configuration owner type

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: ACCOUNT  
Update requires: No interruption

ModelEnforcement.description: Model-specific information for the enforced guardrail configuration. If not present, the configuration is enforced on all models

IncludedModels.description: Models to enforce the guardrail on

items.markdownDescription:
Model identifier or ALL

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^(ALL|([a-z0-9-]{1,63}[.]{1}[a-z0-9-]{1,63})([:][a-z0-9-]{1,63}){0,2}(/[a-z0-9]{12}){0,1})$  
Update requires: No interruption

IncludedModels.markdownDescription:
Models to enforce the guardrail on

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

ExcludedModels.description: Models to exclude from enforcement. If a model is in both lists, it is excluded

items.markdownDescription:
Model identifier to exclude

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^([a-z0-9-]{1,63}[.]{1}[a-z0-9-]{1,63})([:][a-z0-9-]{1,63}){0,2}(/[a-z0-9]{12}){0,1}$  
Update requires: No interruption

ExcludedModels.markdownDescription:
Models to exclude from enforcement. If a model is in both lists, it is excluded

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

ModelEnforcement.markdownDescription:
Model-specific information for the enforced guardrail configuration. If not present, the configuration is enforced on all models

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

ConfigId.description: Unique ID for the account enforced configuration
ConfigId.markdownDescription:
Unique ID for the account enforced configuration

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[a-z0-9]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

GuardrailIdentifier.description: Identifier for the guardrail, could be the ID or the ARN
GuardrailIdentifier.markdownDescription:
Identifier for the guardrail, could be the ID or the ARN

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^(([a-z0-9]+)|(arn:aws(-[^:]+)?:bedrock:[a-z0-9-]{1,20}:[0-9]{12}:guardrail/[a-z0-9]+))$  
Update requires: No interruption

GuardrailVersion.markdownDescription:
Numerical guardrail version (not DRAFT)

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[1-9][0-9]{0,7}$  
Update requires: No interruption

GuardrailArn.markdownDescription:
ARN representation for the guardrail

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^arn:aws(-[^:]+)?:bedrock:[a-z0-9-]{1,20}:[0-9]{12}:guardrail/[a-z0-9]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

GuardrailId.markdownDescription:
Unique ID for the guardrail

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 64  
Pattern: ^[a-z0-9]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
